discovery:
**Steam News** allows you to have Steam game news and price changes sent directly to a channel of your choice in your Discord server.

It also has a command for displaying info on a game, with much more details than just pasting the Steam store URL.

rebrand-reset.description: Return to the bot's default appearance (this is free).

voting.thanks: Thank you for voting! You can now add %s more watchers of each type in your servers.

help.title: Steam News help
help.description: **Steam News** is a bot that lets you follow Steam game news by sending community announcements, patch notes etc directly into a channel.

fields.name: How do I follow a game’s news/price?
fields.value: Add a watcher with `/watch`, remove it with `/unwatch`.

fields.name: How many games can I follow?
fields.value: By default, you can follow ${WATCH_LIMIT} news feeds and as many prices (which can be of different games). You can have an additional ${WATCH_VOTE_BONUS} news feeds and prices if you vote for us on Top.gg (link at the end of this message).

fields.name: The bot didn’t send the latest news at the second it came out!
fields.value: That is normal. It checks for news once an hour, so there can be up to an hour of delay.

fields.name: What about NSFW games?
fields.value: The bot will only send info and news about NSFW games in NSFW channels.

fields.name: Can I copy your bot?
fields.value:
Sure! It’s open sourced under the GNU GPL 3.0 licence.
Here is the Git repository: ${repository}

fields.name: I still need help!
fields.value: That is unfortunate. You can come explain your issue on our support server: ${SUPPORT_SERVER}

fields.name: One last thing
fields.value: Like Steam News? Consider upvoting it on Top.gg: ${VOTE}

rebrand.disabled: Sorry! The rebranding is currently disabled.
rebrand.pay: Sorry, this is a paid feature. Please buy a rebrand token in the store.
rebrand.missing-args: You did not specify an avatar or banner. If you want to remove the custom branding, use rebrand-reset.
rebrand.too-large: This file is too large. The maximum is 1 MB.
rebrand.avatar-rate-limit: You made me change my avatar too much and Discord is rate-limiting me. Please try again later.
rebrand.banner-rate-limit: You made me change my banner too much and Discord is rate-limiting me. Please try again later.
rebrand.failure:
The rebranding failed with the message '%s'.
Your rebrand token has not been consumed.
rebrand.success:
My appearance has been changed! I feel young again.
If you do not see the change, try reloading Discord.
rebrand.grace: In case you change your mind or want to make adjustments, you can use this command again for free within the next hour.
rebrand.resetFailure: The appearance reset failed with the message '%s'.
rebrand.resetSuccess:
My appearance has been reset.
If you do not see the change, try reloading Discord.

chameleon.disabled: Sorry! Chameleon features are currently disabled.
chameleon.pay: You need a subscription to access this feature.

help.title: Chameleon help
help.description:
First of all, your server needs to have either the Chameleon of the Gold Plan subscription (see the buttons below).
Once your are subscribed, the chameleon features will be enabled in your server. The bot uses **webhooks** to send news/sales with a different name and avatar for each game.
There are two ways to set those webhooks up:

fields.name: Letting the bot do it
fields.description:
First, you need to grand the bot the **manage webhooks** permissions.
Once this is done, you can use `/premium chameleon create` to make a new webhook, or `/premium chameleon auto` to automatically create a webhook for all your watched games, using each game's name and logo.
The bot tries to only use one webhook per channel to avoid clutter, but don't worry, it can still change its appearance for every game!

fields.name: Setting up the webhooks yourself
fields.description:
First, create a webhook by opening the channel settings and going into “Integrations”. There you can customize its name and avatar.
Then, copy its URL.
Finally, use the `/webhook chameleon set` to assign that webhook to a given watcher.

chameleon.no-webhooks: You have no webhooks set up.
chameleon.invalid-url: You did not provide a valid webhook URL.
chameleon.wrong-token: I seem to be unable to use this webhook. Are you sure you provided the full, correct URL?
chameleon.not-found: I could not find any webhook with that URL. Either it was the wrong URL, or the webhook was deleted.
chameleon.wrong-channel:
That webhook belongs to a different channel than the one where that game's news are sent.
Channels only share their webhooks with their threads.
chameleon.server-error: The Discord servers errorred when I tried checking that webhook URL. Please try again later.
chameleon.unknown-error: Got error %s when trying to validate the webhook URL.
chameleon.webhook-set: The webhook was set. You can test it by using %s with that game in its channel.
chameleon.webhook-set-price: The webhook was set for price updates.
chameleon.unknown-watcher: I could not find this watcher. Please make sure to select an option from the autocomplete.
chameleon.webhook-set-error: I could not set the webhook. Please try again later.

api-failed: Connection to the Steam API failed; please try again in a few minutes.
api-403: Access to this game was denied (error 403).
bad-appid: The id you provided does not belong to any Steam app.
no-DLC-news: DLCs do not have a news feed.
NSFW-content-news: This game has adult content. You can only display its news in a NSFW channel.
NSFW-content-price: This game has adult content. You can only display its price in a NSFW channel.

info.invalidAppid: The id you provided does not belong to any Steam app.
info.nsfwForbidden: This game has adult content. You can only display its info in a NSFW channel.

locale.current: Your current locale is %s (%s), with %s as the preferred language.
locale.no-default: This server does not have a default locale.
locale.new-default: This server’s default locale is now %s (%s), with %s as its preferred language.
locale.cc-required:
You need to provide a country’s 2-letter code.
You can find the list here: %s
locale.cc-invalid:
This is not a valid Alpha-2 code.
You can find the list here: %s

watch.price-unknown: Error: could not find price for this game.

Warning: you reached your ${LIMIT} games per server limit.
Vote for me on [Top.gg](${vote}) or buy **premium** to watch up to ${MAX_BONUS} more.
watch.server-limit-reached-voted: Warning: you reached your %s games per server limit. Buy **premium** to increase it.
watch.server-max-reached: Warning: you reached the limit of %s games per server.
watch.error-limit-reached:
You reached or exceeded the base limit of ${LIMIT} watchers per server.
Vote for me on [Top.gg](${vote}) or buy **premium** to watch up to ${MAX_BONUS} more.
watch.error-limit-reached-voted: Sorry, you reached your limit of %s watchers per server. Buy **premium** to increase it.
watch.error-max-reached: Sorry, you reached the limit of %s watchers per server.
watch.confirm-price: %s’s price updates will now be sent into %s.
watch.confirm-news: %s’s news will now be sent into %s.
watch.already-price: %s’s price was already watched in this server.
watch.already-news: %s’s news feed was already watched in this server.
watch.webhook-auto-unset: Since the watcher channel changed, the webhook has been unset.

watched.none: No game is watched in this server.

unwatch.news-unchanged: %s was not being watched in this server.
unwatch.price-unwatched: %s’s price is no longer watched in this server.
unwatch.price-unchanged: %s’s price was not being watched in this server.

steam.unwatched: News about Steam are no longer watched in this server.
